data.title: Senate Banking Committee supports barring institutions from buying family homes, potentially delaying crypto bill: Bloomberg.
data.description: According to Bloomberg, the Senate Banking Committee is supporting President Donald Trump's decision to prevent institutions from purchasing family homes. This action has the potential to stall the bill concerning market structure.

data.title: Ryanair CEO O'Leary thanks Elon Musk for boosting bookings, invites investment, cites €100-200 million cost to install Starlink.
data.description: Ryanair Holdings CEO Michael O'Leary recently disclosed a positive impact on the company's bookings after a public disagreement with Elon Musk. O'Leary expressed gratitude for the publicity generated by the conflict and even extended an invitation for Musk to consider investing in the airline, highlighting superior returns compared to other options. O'Leary also addressed Ryanair's decision not to implement Starlink satellite internet due to high installation costs and the potential fuel consumption increase, estimating an annual rise in fuel expenses between €100 million and €200 million. Musk's criticism of O'Leary as "an utter idiot" and the suggestion of acquiring the airline to oust and replace the CEO with an individual named "Ryan" stirred controversy earlier in the week. For more details, visit the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Crypto bill with critical numbers heads to Senate Ag. Markup, despite lack of bipartisan agreement in Banking Committee.
data.description: The Agriculture Committee is making progress on cryptocurrency legislation, despite a lack of consensus across party lines, while the Banking Committee is experiencing a delay in its own activities.

data.title: Corvus Pharmaceuticals increases public offering to 7,900,677 common shares at $22.15 each, raising approx $175.0M.
data.description: Corvus Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company based in South San Francisco, disclosed on January 21, 2026, that it has finalized the pricing for an expanded underwritten public offering. The offering comprises 7,900,677 shares of its common stock, priced at $22.15 per share for the public. Gross proceeds from this offering, before subtracting underwriting discounts, commissions, and estimated offering expenses, are anticipated to total around $175.0 million. It is important to note that all the common stock shares are being offered by Corvus. Additionally, the company has provided the underwriters of this offering with a 30-day option to acquire up to an additional 1,185,101 shares of common stock at the same public offering price, minus underwriting discounts and commissions.

data.title: By 2030, crypto market may reach $28 trillion fueled by Bitcoin, DeFi, tokenization - ARK predicts $1 million price for Bitcoin.
data.description: ARK Invest has recently released an analysis indicating their belief that Bitcoin will reach nearly $1 million in value by 2030 due to increasing adoption.

data.title: X will introduce "Starterpacks" with top crypto accounts. Head of product Nikita Bier revealed over 1,000 pre-made packs in various categories. Launch set in weeks.
data.description: According to Nikita Bier, the head of product at X, a new feature is set to be released within the next few weeks. This feature will include over 1,000 pre-made "packs" of accounts tailored for various interest categories such as memecoin trading and crypto.

data.title: BioAge upsized public offering priced at $19.50 per share, expected to raise $115.0 million. Jan. 23 closing likely.
data.description: On Jan. 21, 2026, BioAge Labs, Inc. (Nasdaq: BIOA) announced the pricing of an upsized underwritten public offering of 5,897,435 shares of common stock at $19.50 per share. The gross proceeds are expected to total around $115.0 million, excluding underwriting discounts, commissions, and other expenses. The offering, expected to close by Jan. 23, 2026, pending customary conditions, includes a 30-day option for underwriters to buy up to 884,615 additional shares. All shares are offered by BioAge to advance therapeutic products for metabolic diseases through targeting human aging biology.

data.title: Ultra raised $11 million to develop a clean, non-addictive pouch, targeting high performers in new market category.
data.description: In New York, a recent Series A funding round led by Left Lane Capital, with support from CPG giants Harry’s, Grüns, and Rockstar Energy, has seen Ultra raise $11 million. This investment aims to develop a clean, non-addictive pouch tailored for high performers who value wellness. Ultra is pioneering a new category by offering a "good-for-you" alternative for consumers focused on enhancing productivity without sacrificing their health.

data.title: Ondo Finance launches 'Full TradFi Portfolio' on Solana with over 200 assets including Nvidia, Microsoft, ETFs, gold.
data.description: Ondo Finance, a platform for tokenizing real-world assets, has launched over 200 blockchain-based stocks, ETFs, bonds, and commodities on Solana. This move to bring traditional finance assets to Solana was announced in an X post by Ondo Finance. Some notable assets available include NVIDIA Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) and Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ: MSFT) stocks, iShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF (NYSE: EEM), treasury bonds, and precious metals like gold and silver. Solana, known for its popularity in decentralized finance, now offers a diverse range of assets through Ondo Finance's tokenization platform.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric named a Clarivate Top 100 Global Innovator 2026 for 14th time, ranking 17th.
data.description: In Tokyo, Mitsubishi Electric Corporation (Stock Ticker: 6503) was acknowledged as one of the Clarivate Top 100 Global Innovators 2026 by Clarivate Plc. This marks the 14th time that Mitsubishi Electric has been honored for its accomplishments in intellectual property (IP). The company secured the 17th position worldwide in this year's rankings.
